strategic_direction: bias away from duplicated twist patterns
prefer enhancement/upgrade candidates before aggressive complexity
冒頭1文で結論、2文目で根拠を示す『主張+証拠』導入を固定化する
CTAを『すぐ試す』と『背景を読む』の2導線に分けて離脱を減らす
role_context.showcase_rationale: 見た目と差分訴求が強い1本にする
portfolio_hotspots: missing or weak live demo links
